prompt: Dark background, field of thousands of small warm cream-colored dots representing living languages, transitioning to orange dots for endangered languages and deep red for critically endangered, with near-black specks at the bottom for extinct languages. Each dot is a language. Minimalist, no axes, no labels, emotional tone of quiet mourning. Style: stars in a night sky fading away, cinematic lighting, high detail, abstract data visualization, 4k
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Of roughly 7,000 human languages, half are endangered and one disappears every two weeks — each extinction erasing a unique way of naming the world.
